$comment: Cluster G (SQLite-readiness): <stdint.h>/<stddef.h>/<stdarg.h> resolve via neutral shipped JSON descriptors (shippedLibs/{stdint,stddef,stdarg}.json — the FIRST real consumer of the FC14 typedef-injection path). int32_t/uint8_t (global + local) and size_t are descriptor typedefs; va_list+va_* are the existing builtins (the stdarg descriptor is a resolver shell, builtin va_list wins). exit 42 == 40 + 2 via mutable globals (optimizer can't fold them, so the release arm runs the real typedef path). RED-on-disable: delete any of the 3 descriptors -> the matching `#include` fires F_ShippedHeaderNotFound (rendered F001A) and the compile fails.
